title: coleus villosus
intro: Coleus villosus, also known as the hairy coleus, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Coleus villosus include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
